title: Fresh Fruit Crumble
description: A delicious dessert made with fresh fruit and a crunchy butter crumble topping.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sliced peaches and blueberries. Add the granulated sugar and mix until the fruit is evenly coated.
Transfer the fruit mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together the flour and cold butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the oat crumble to the flour mixture and mix until well combined.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the fruit filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
